Ω : Type u_3

ι : Type u_6
inst✝⁵ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderBot ι
inst✝³ : Countable ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝¹ : OrderTopology ι
X : ι → Ω → ℝ
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝ : SigmaFiniteFiltration μ 𝓕
hX : Submartingale X 𝓕 μ
τ : ℕ → Ω → WithTop ι
hτ : ∀ (i : ℕ), IsStoppingTime 𝓕 (τ i)
n : ι
hτ_le : ∀ (i : ℕ) (ω : Ω), τ i ω ≤ ↑n
⊢ UniformIntegrable (fun i => stoppedValue X (τ i)) 1 μ

    (hX.martingale_prod_const (Y := X)).2
  have hUI : UniformIntegrable (fun i ↦ stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i)) 1 μ :=
    Martingale.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue (μ := μ) (𝓕 := 𝓕) hX' τ hτ hτ_le
  have hfst :
      (fun i ↦ stoppedValue X (τ i)) =
        (fun i ↦ fun ω ↦ (stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i) ω).1) := by
    funext i ω
    rfl
  have hmeas : ∀ i, AEStronglyMeasurable (fun ω ↦ (stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i) ω).1) μ :=
    fun i ↦ (hUI.1 i).fst
  have hdom :
      ∀ i, ∃ j, ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ,
        ‖(fun ω ↦ (stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i) ω).1) ω‖ ≤
          ‖stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ j) ω‖ := by
    intro i
    refine ⟨i, ?_⟩
    filter_upwards with ω
    simpa using (Prod.fst_norm_le (stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i) ω))
  have hUIfst :
      UniformIntegrable
        (fun i ↦ fun ω ↦ (stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i) ω).1) 1 μ :=
    uniformIntegrable_of_dominated (E := ℝ) (F := ℝ × ℝ) hUI hmeas hdom
  simpa [hfst] using hUIfst

classical
  let Y : ι → Ω → ℝ := fun i ω ↦ X i ω - X n ω
  have hY_mg : Martingale Y 𝓕 μ := by
    simpa [Y, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hX.martingale_sub_const n
  have hUI_Y : UniformIntegrable (fun i ↦ stoppedValue Y (τ i)) 1 μ :=
    Martingale.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue (X := Y) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (μ := μ)
      hY_mg τ hτ (n := n) hτ_le
  have hUI_const : UniformIntegrable (fun _ : ℕ ↦ X n) 1 μ :=
    uniformIntegrable_subsingleton (f := fun _ : Unit ↦ X n) le_rfl (by simp)
      (fun _ ↦ memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 <| hX.integrable n)
      |>.comp (fun _ : ℕ ↦ ())
  have hUI_negconst : UniformIntegrable (fun _ : ℕ ↦ -X n) 1 μ := by
    simpa [Pi.neg_apply] using hUI_const.neg
  have hUI_Xn : UniformIntegrable (fun i ↦ stoppedValue (fun _ : ι ↦ X n) (τ i)) 1 μ := by
    have : (fun i ↦ stoppedValue (fun _ : ι ↦ X n) (τ i)) = fun _ : ℕ ↦ X n := by
      funext i; simp [stoppedValue]
    simpa [this] using hUI_const
  have hUI_sum :
      UniformIntegrable
        (fun i ↦ stoppedValue Y (τ i) + stoppedValue (fun _ : ι ↦ X n) (τ i)) 1 μ :=
    hUI_Y.add (E := ℝ) (X := fun i ↦ stoppedValue Y (τ i))
      (Y := fun i ↦ stoppedValue (fun _ : ι ↦ X n) (τ i)) (p := 1) le_rfl hUI_Xn
  have hAE :
      (fun i ↦ stoppedValue Y (τ i) + stoppedValue (fun _ : ι ↦ X n) (τ i))
        =ᵐ[μ] (fun i ↦ stoppedValue X (τ i)) := by
    intro i
    filter_upwards [] with ω
    simp [Y, stoppedValue, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
  exact hUI_sum.ae_eq hAE.symm

classical
  have hX' : Martingale (fun i ↦ fun ω ↦ (X i ω : ℝ)) 𝓕 μ :=
    (hX.martingale_of_isClosedConvex (s := Set.univ) (by simpa using isClosed_univ)
      (by simpa using convex_univ) (by simpa using measurableSet_univ))
  have : UniformIntegrable (fun i ↦ stoppedValue X (τ i)) 1 μ :=
    Martingale.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue (μ := μ) (𝓕 := 𝓕) hX' τ hτ (n := n) hτ_le
  simpa using this

classical
  have hMn : Martingale (fun _ : Unit ↦ X n) 𝓕 μ := by
    refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro _; exact (hX.adapted n)
    · intro i j hij
      simp [condExp_const]
    · intro _; simpa using hX.integrable n
  have : UniformIntegrable (fun i ↦ stoppedValue (fun _ : Unit ↦ X n) (τ i)) 1 μ :=
    Martingale.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue (X := fun _ : Unit ↦ X n) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (μ := μ)
      hMn τ hτ (n := n) hτ_le
  simpa [stoppedValue_const] using this

classical
  have hM : Martingale (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) 𝓕 μ :=
    hX.martingale_prod_self
  have hUI :=
    (Martingale.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue (X := fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (𝓕 := 𝓕)
        (μ := μ) hM τ hτ (n := n) hτ_le)
  have hUI_fst : UniformIntegrable (fun i ↦ fun ω ↦ (stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i) ω).1) 1 μ :=
    uniformIntegrable_of_dominated hUI
      (fun i ↦ (hUI.aestronglyMeasurable i).fst)
      (fun i ↦ ⟨i, by
        filter_upwards with ω
        simpa using Prod.fst_le_norm (stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i) ω)⟩)
  have hfst_eq :
      (fun i ↦ fun ω ↦ (stoppedValue (fun i ↦ (X i, X i)) (τ i) ω).1)
        = (fun i ↦ stoppedValue X (τ i)) := by
    funext i ω
    simp [stoppedValue]
  simpa [hfst_eq] using hUI_fst

classical
  by_cases hμ : IsFiniteMeasure μ
  · letI : IsFiniteMeasure μ := hμ
    exact (hX.martingale_part).uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue (τ := τ) hτ hτ_le
  · have hIsEmpty : IsEmpty Ω := by
      by_contra hne
      have : (μ univ) < ∞ := by
        simpa using (measure_lt_top μ Set.univ)
      exact hμ ⟨this⟩
    classical
    subst hIsEmpty
    simpa using (uniformIntegrable_of_isEmpty (μ := μ) (X := fun i ↦ stoppedValue X (τ i)) (p := (1 : ℝ≥0∞)))

classical
  have hMn : Martingale (fun _ : Unit ↦ X n) 𝓕 μ :=
    martingale_const (𝓕 := 𝓕) (μ := μ) (X := X n)
  have hUI_sub :
      UniformIntegrable (fun i ↦ stoppedValue (fun _ : Unit ↦ X n) (τ i)) 1 μ :=
    Martingale.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue (X := fun _ : Unit ↦ X n) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (μ := μ)
      (ι := ι) (E := ℝ) hMn (τ := τ) (hτ := hτ) (n := n) (hτ_le := hτ_le)
  simpa using hUI_sub
